results.title: Savukku Shankar freed after Goondas Act revoked, praises Vijay, hits out at DMK
results.description: Chennai, May 23 (IANS) Popular YouTuber and political commentator Savukku Shankar was released from Puzhal Central Prison after the Tamil Nadu government revoked the preventive [...]

results.title: Suresh Triveni reveals plan of bringing Madhuri Dixit, Anil Kapoor together for a comedy project
results.description: Mumbai, May 23 (SocialNews.XYZ) Filmmaker Suresh Triveni is currently thrilled to work with Bollywood superstar Madhuri Dixit in his upcoming show ‘Maa Behen.’ The actor also spoke about working with another Bollywood superstar Anil Kapoor... The post Suresh Triveni reveals plan of bringing Madhuri Dixit, Anil Kapoor together for a comedy project appeared first on Social News XYZ .

results.title: ABC fans cry 'so sad' after David Muir steps away to take on alternative TV opportunity
results.description: ABC viewers were left heartbroken as a tragic 911 call and emotional family tributes revealed new details about NASCAR star's death while host David Muir is away

results.title: 'Shrek the Musical Jr.' brings 50 local kids to the stage in Bedford
results.description: A youth cast from Bedford and surrounding towns brings Shrek Jr. to the stage for the first time this June.
